claim: Omnigent installer currently has no codebase-memory skip/install flag.
Omnigent base install uses uv tool install and is currently fatal if that install fails.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: install_omnigent builds target then calls run_with_spinner uv tool install --force -q --python \$PYTHON_VERSION\" \"$target\"."
notes: Companion install should be separate and non-fatal.

claim: Installer main has a clean insertion point after Omnigent install and verification.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: main calls install_omnigent, computes bin_dir, verifies omnigent, updates PATH, and prints next steps.
notes: Best insertion: after verify_omnigent and before maybe_add_bin_to_path/next steps.

claim: Installer tests can cover flag parsing and shell functions without network.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Tests strip the trailing main call, source the installer as a shell library, and run snippets in fresh POSIX sh.
notes: Use same pattern for skip flag and stubbed companion install.

claim: omnigent setup is an explicit user-facing setup command where repair/check prompts can live.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: setup prints landing, then standard path runs _run_configure_harnesses_interactive; internal-beta path performs explicit setup side effects.
notes: Good home for explicit check/repair, not hidden package install.

claim: Remote sandbox wheel overlays do not install new dependencies automatically.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: host_image_wheel_install_command uses pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps oa-wheels/*.whl against DEFAULT_HOST_IMAGE.
notes: Remote sandbox integration must be a host image layer follow-up.

claim: Omnigent currently has no direct codebase-memory-mcp reference in inspected files.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: rg over pyproject.toml, scripts/install_oss.sh, omnigent/onboarding/sandboxes/base.py, omnigent/cli.py, and tests/scripts/test_install_oss.py found no codebase-memory references.
notes: Search was scoped to likely first-PR files, not the entire repository.

claim: codebase-memory-mcp PyPI package exposes a console script, not vendored Omnigent behavior.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Project name is codebase-memory-mcp and project.scripts maps codebase-memory-mcp to codebase_memory_mcp:main.
notes: Supports uv tool install as companion tool.

claim: The PyPI wrapper downloads a platform binary from GitHub Releases on first run.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: _download builds a GitHub Releases URL and fetches the platform archive; main downloads if bin_path does not exist, then execs it.
notes: Omnigent should call --version during install to surface download failures immediately and warn non-fatally.

claim: codebase-memory-mcp install writes/refreshes agent configs and hooks.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: install auto-detects agents and configures MCP config, instruction files, and hooks.
notes: This is an explicit installer/setup side effect, not package dependency behavior.

claim: auto_index is an explicit codebase-memory-mcp configuration setting.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: README documents codebase-memory-mcp config set auto_index true and says new projects index automatically on MCP session start.
notes: Safe to repair/check separately from package dependency installation.

claim: Running codebase-memory-mcp install with -y can delete existing index DBs automatically.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: If count_db_indexes(home) > 0, install prompts to delete indexes; parse_auto_answer makes -y answer yes automatically, then cbm_remove_indexes runs unless dry-run.
conflicts: Conflicts with unconditional install -y in the initial plan.
notes: This is the main caveat discovered by the run.

claim: codebase-memory-mcp install --plan is non-mutating and reports planned agent config writes.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: --plan emits a machine-readable receipt without config writes, index deletion, or network; next_safe_command is install -y.
notes: Useful for Omnigent setup/verbose transparency, but current plan does not remove the -y index caveat.

claim: Provider probe found usable proposer/skeptic routes and an agy limitation.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: claude-sonnet, claude-haiku, and vibe-default returned expected probe tokens; agy-default exited 0 with empty stdout.
notes: Use claude-sonnet and vibe-default for debate; record agy limitation.

claim: Proposer pass supports companion install with warning-not-fatal behavior.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: The proposer rejected vendoring/dependency and recommended installer binary install plus setup repair, with tests for skip and non-fatal failures.
notes: Opinion only; accepted where supported by code evidence.

claim: Skeptic pass identified runtime download, remote sandbox, and default mutation risks.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: The skeptic pushed for guardrails around platform/download, remote sandbox exclusion, and not doing deep hooks in the first PR.
notes: Some proposed hard-fail/opt-in defaults are stricter than needed, but risks are useful.
